description: The L_Shape.inp building model is open in eQUEST, representing a commercial building with HVAC zones across four floors served by Packaged Single Zone (PSZ) systems. As an energy conservation measure to reduce cooling demand, set the design cooling temperature (DESIGN-COOL-T) for zone 'South Perim Zn (BB.S1)' (system 'Sys1 (PSZ) (BB.C1)') to 76°F. Save the project.
